title: Ropedia Xperience-10M Release Checks
rule: A release is current when the automated reports pass and the live GitHub/Hugging Face mirrors are verified after publishing.

automated_gates.title: Multi-episode pilot status
automated_gates.blocks_if: Setup identifiers are presented as completed held-out metrics.
automated_gates.shows: Qwen3-Omni setup artifacts stay distinct from the planned held-out pilot.

automated_gates.title: Source alignment
automated_gates.blocks_if: Official full-dataset facts, sample-card facts, API-listing notes, or project coverage are missing or inconsistent.
automated_gates.shows: The repo, website, and Hugging Face cards preserve the Xperience-10M source facts and current project scope.

automated_gates.title: Website integrity
automated_gates.blocks_if: Local links, anchors, JSON bundles, or referenced image assets are missing or invalid.
automated_gates.shows: The GitHub Pages / HF static surface is self-consistent before upload.

automated_gates.title: Rendered website check
automated_gates.blocks_if: The local rendered site cannot load, switch tabs, deep-link to the walkthrough, update player controls, or stay console-clean.
automated_gates.shows: The published static page has a recent browser-level interaction record in addition to static link checks.

automated_gates.title: Task surface integrity
automated_gates.blocks_if: Task cards expose raw artifact ids, human-readable task names drift, modality thumbnails are missing, or the interactive task player is not wired to the generated JSON.
automated_gates.shows: The public task cards and walkthrough/player stay aligned with generated 12-task metadata.

automated_gates.title: Evaluation protocol
automated_gates.blocks_if: Windowing, split policy, leakage controls, task metrics, or current limitations are not explicit.
automated_gates.shows: The task evaluation protocol is generated from committed metric artifacts.

automated_gates.title: Figure index
automated_gates.blocks_if: Public figures, charts, or modality thumbnails are missing, unreadable, or lack source-script provenance.
automated_gates.shows: Public visual assets have dimensions, SHA-256 hashes, source scripts, and presentation roles.

automated_gates.title: Brand assets
automated_gates.blocks_if: The generated logo system, favicon, social card, or app icons are missing or not reproducibly packaged.
automated_gates.shows: The same project logo is available for website header, favicon, README, Hugging Face cards, and social previews.

automated_gates.title: Release-check manifest
automated_gates.blocks_if: A public reader cannot see the current release state in one place.
automated_gates.shows: The release checklist is explicit, versioned, and mirrored with the repo.

automated_gates.title: Artifact index
automated_gates.blocks_if: Project-critical evidence files are missing from the indexed artifact layer.
automated_gates.shows: Core project artifacts exist and stable files have SHA-256 hashes.

automated_gates.title: Public bundle contents
automated_gates.blocks_if: Raw data, caches, heavy archives, credential text, missing required assets, or outdated public-card assets enter public bundles.
automated_gates.shows: The repo and prepared HF bundles contain the intended public files for release.

automated_gates.title: Public project surface
automated_gates.blocks_if: Repo, website, or Hugging Face presentation loses SEO/social metadata, accessible tab semantics, source links, project-check links, or clear project language.
automated_gates.shows: The public repo, website, and Hugging Face cards read as one cohesive research project surface.

automated_gates.title: Prepared mirror parity
automated_gates.blocks_if: Prepared HF Space, artifact dataset, or model bundle diverges from the repo for critical files.
automated_gates.shows: The files staged for GitHub and Hugging Face are synchronized before upload.

post_publish_checks.title: Live publication verifier
post_publish_checks.required_result: live GitHub Pages, GitHub raw, HF Space, artifact dataset, and model mirrors match the current release assets

post_publish_checks.title: Rendered browser check
post_publish_checks.evidence: Browser/Playwright page identity, nonblank render, console health, and one local interaction
post_publish_checks.required_result: no relevant console warnings/errors and target links work

scope_note: These checks cover public packaging, project status wording, mirror parity, and website integrity. Cross-episode model quality is measured by later held-out evaluation reports.
